summary: Lane CT-011: Fixed 3 binder durability gaps in packages/opencode/src/campaign/binder.ts. Bug 1: reconstructBinder now replays evidence_added events via applyEvidenceToBinder helper. Bug 2: getBindersByCampaignId queries EventStore on cache miss. Bug 3: ensureBinder added for idempotent early binder creation. Bug 4 was already fixed by CT-003. Typecheck: zero new errors, 2 pre-existing in binder.ts.
